evals.prompt: You are the triage-agent. For ticket PROJ-102 (FEATURE/P3 — Add SETTLEMENT_DATE to FCT_TRADES and expose it in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS), classify the ticket as ISSUE/FEATURE, set severity, list impacted objects, and recommend the downstream route. The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-102.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-102/PROJ-102.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: triage-agent correctly classify the ticket as ISSUE/FEATURE, set severity, list impacted objects, and recommend the downstream route for PROJ-102, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Lists impacted objects including FCT_TRADES and VW_DAILY_POSITIONS
